title: Produce mode: support json_mode and text extraction strategies alongside with_structured_output
description: Produce mode always uses llm.with_structured_output(model) which fails on DeepSeek Reasoner/V3 (400: response_format type unavailable). Production pattern: inject JSON schema into prompt + bind response_format=json_object + parse manually. Add llm_config.output_strategy: structured (current), json_mode (schema-in-prompt, widest compat), text (plain text + parse). Default should be json_mode for widest provider support.
